title: senecio caudatus
intro: Senecio caudatus, also known as Bear's Head or Long-tailed Ragwort, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Senecio caudatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried for later use in traditional medicine.
